iteration_1.notes: Baseline - original Chinese skill too verbose, model loaded skill but produced no response for batch rename

iteration_2.notes: Rewrote skill in English, concise format. Batch rename partially working but dot in v3.1 replaced with hyphen

iteration_3.notes: Added dot preservation guidance but model skipped skill loading, wrote own regex without dots

iteration_4.notes: Made description urgently recommend loading skill, put dot preservation as top-level IMPORTANT section with wrong/right examples. Confirmed with extra run.

changes: Replaced Chinese skill with concise English version
Added explicit kebab-case rename section with dot preservation rules
Made skill description emphasize critical edge cases to encourage skill loading
Added correct/incorrect examples for dot handling (v3.1)
Provided copy-paste Python rename script with correct regex [^a-z0-9.]+
Reduced skill length from ~400 lines to ~50 lines
